scripts.compile: npm run build:core && npm run build:transport && npm run compile:webview && npm run compile:extension
scripts.test: npm -w @hivefetch/core run test && npm -w hivefetch run test
scripts.test:all: npm -w @hivefetch/core run test && npm -w hivefetch run test && npm -w @hivefetch/ui run test
scripts.test:coverage: npm -w @hivefetch/core run test && npm -w hivefetch run test:coverage
